name: Sprig
description: Two-leaf sprigs unfurling from the centre, re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 28%; top: 30%; @size: 42%; border-radius: 0 100%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transform: rotate(-30deg); transform: rotate(-30deg); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; right: 28%; top: 30%; @size: 42%; border-radius: 100% 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transform: rotate(30deg); transform: rotate(30deg); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
